topics.name: Review Bottleneck
topics.current_coverage: Codex/Human review boundary and bottleneck risk are documented; distributed reviewer pools and quorum are not defined.
topics.decision: Design domain reviewer pools, review leases, risk-based quorum and conflict escalation in V11.1 while retaining Codex/Human final authority.

topics.name: Tenant Isolation
topics.current_coverage: Tenant and civilization scope, scoped foreign keys, role permissions, quotas and cross-tenant denial are already present.
topics.decision: Retain the existing model and add a conformance matrix and isolation tests in V11.1.

topics.name: State Versioning
topics.current_coverage: Optimistic versioning, compare-and-set, append-only audit, supersession and rollback concepts exist.
topics.decision: Define immutable state versions, snapshot cadence, conflict policy and rollback targets in V11.1.

topics.name: Plugin Framework
topics.current_coverage: Plugin SDK boundary, capability manifest, schema version, compatibility, sandbox, validation, health and fallback are already defined.
topics.decision: Do not duplicate the framework; add conformance fixtures after Human approval.

topics.name: Observability
topics.current_coverage: Metrics, health, audit, attendance and evidence exist without a unified trace, SLO and retention architecture.
topics.decision: Add an observability architecture proposal with trace context, structured events, metrics, SLOs, redaction and dashboard ownership.

topics.name: Distributed Orchestration
topics.current_coverage: Dispatcher, queues, priority, leases, partitions, sharding and backpressure are defined at a logical level.
topics.decision: Specify durable queues, scheduler topology, worker pools, shard ownership, retry and recovery in V11.1; defer implementation.

topics.name: Resource Management
topics.current_coverage: Quotas, provider budgets, rate limits, backpressure and cost telemetry exist in partial form.
topics.decision: Define reservation, consumption, reconciliation, circuit breaker and simulation cost ledger policies in V11.1.

topics.name: Provider Runtime
topics.current_coverage: Provider adapter, capability broker, health, fallback and capability/cost-aware routing are already present.
topics.decision: Retain the provider-neutral model and formalize deterministic routing evidence in V11.1.

topics.name: Security
topics.current_coverage: External secrets, scoped grants, sandbox, denied capabilities, risk gates, Human override and protected action denial are defined.
topics.decision: Retain existing boundaries and add threat-model and negative-test coverage rather than a parallel security layer.

topics.name: Future Scale
topics.current_coverage: V11 covers 10, 50, 100 and 500+ Agents using indexed queues, partitions, distributed leases and backpressure.
topics.decision: Validate 100 to 10000 Agent architecture in V11.1 and defer 100000 Agent multi-region production architecture to V12.

rejected_alternatives: Replace Codex and Human final review with unsupervised distributed majority approval.
Grant plugins or workers main merge, protected path, secret, wallet signing or production deployment authority.
Build 100000-Agent production infrastructure during V11 Genesis Design.
Mix real billing, payment or financial settlement into the V11 resource model.
v11_1_roadmap: Immutable State Version and Snapshot Standard
Distributed Scheduler and Worker Pool Design
Quota, Budget, Rate Limit and Circuit Breaker Standard
Security, Plugin, Tenant and Recovery Conformance Tests
v12_roadmap: Global shard rebalancing and cross-region disaster recovery
Federated reviewer network and cross-civilization governance
Production-grade chargeback and billing subject to legal and Human approval
Platform SRE, capacity forecasting and policy distribution
